title: what if evangelion was dubbed by The Ocean Group
display_title: what if evangelion was dubbed by The Ocean Group
wikitext:
[]: what if evangelion was dubbed by The Ocean Group             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Tue Feb 28, 2012 6:17 pm what if nge was dubbed by the Ocean Group the studio that had canadians dubbed dbz first, before funimation did? what if it was dubbed by canadians? what do u think? who would dub them?

[]: Re: what if evangelion was dubbed by The Ocean Group             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Feb 28, 2012 6:31 pm trkk-KAAN wrote: what if nge was dubbed by the Ocean Group the studio that had canadians dubbed dbz first, before funimation did? what if it was dubbed by canadians? what do u think? who would dub them?

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Feb 28, 2012 6:38 pm It would sound more gundam like (in terms of english dub voices) that's what would happen. The voices are fine as they stand as I only watch it with the Japanese voice track, the only things I watch dubbed is gundam and deathnote.

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Tue Feb 28, 2012 7:03 pm well here is how i would imagine the canadian dub to be< Shinji: Sam Vincent Rei: Andrea Libman Asuka: Tabitha st Germain Misato: Julie Lemieux Toji: Matt Hill or Sam Vincent or Ian James Cortlett or Terry Klassen (i dont know) Kensuke: Sam Vincent Shigeru Aoba: Brian Drummond or Scott McNeil Ritsuko Akagi: Kathleen Barr Kaji: Ian James Cortlett or Kirby Mirrow Makoto Hyuaga: Ian James Cortlett or Brian Drummond Gendo Ikari: I Dont Know, you decide

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Feb 28, 2012 8:03 pm Kirby Morrow as Kaji would be fun.

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Tue Feb 28, 2012 8:26 pm What if Evangelion wasn't dubbed and the Japanese voice actors spoke in Engrish?

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Tue Feb 28, 2012 9:04 pm Radical Lanzar wrote: What if Evangelion wasn't dubbed and the Japanese voice actors spoke in Engrish?

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Wed Feb 29, 2012 1:17 am The evangelion dub would be Better if the ocean group dubbed it and had the cast I put up and it won't be too bad

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 29, 2012 2:34 am This is going to turn into another subs vs dubs, I can tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Wed Feb 29, 2012 4:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: This is going to turn into another subs vs dubs, I can tell.

[]: One thing changed... B)             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Feb 29, 2012 6:58 am Seriously, SCOTT McNEIL , get him and Shinji 40k becomes a reality. If you ask me, he's certainly got the message of the series down.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Feb 29, 2012 1:54 pm Aiko Heiwa wrote: This

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Feb 29, 2012 2:54 pm Gud Ran wit dat dreefkiing. ~Kaji

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Feb 29, 2012 4:45 pm Aiko Heiwa wrote: This

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 29, 2012 5:39 pm I think we've hit a new low guys...

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Wed Feb 29, 2012 6:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I think we've hit a new low guys...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Feb 29, 2012 6:35 pm Don't mind EM guys, he's just a self-hating ex-dubbie himself. Like the "Jews for Jesus" people, only for anime.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Feb 29, 2012 6:44 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I think we've hit a new low guys...

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Wed Feb 29, 2012 9:24 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I think we've hit a new low guys...

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Feb 29, 2012 9:32 pm It could be worse. It could be dubbed by the people who made Charlie the Unicorn .
